body_txt: A war that is kept secret from the public at large. The involved parties may or may not be unknown to Muggles as well, but the central concept of the trope is that the conflict itself is somehow hidden, covert or underground. Basic fodder for Conspiracy Thrillers , Urban Fantasy , and naturally fiction in general. In trope-speak , this is a war that is concealed behind a Masquerade . Compare Great Offscreen War , where the war in question is kept from the audience but not from the characters; this trope tends to be the other way around. May be part of a Secret History . The Marvel Comics Crisis Crossovers can be found at Secret Wars (1984) , Secret War (2004) , and Secret Wars (2015) .
